codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff/transcript, commit `99237f64bf08a3a450851ae38b3991936401f86a`, and current `internal/llm` implementation. In the current repo state, `ProcessRun` derives reviewed and deleted paths from assembled MR changes, `persistFindings` receives that explicit scope, and `transitionMissingFinding` now leaves no-scope reruns unchanged, marks reviewed-clean files fixed, marks mixed-scope/out-of-scope disappearances stale, and still fixes deleted-file disappearances when the canonical anchor is an old-line deleted anchor. Targeted DB-backed tests in `internal/llm/provider_test.go` cover the reviewed-clean, no-reviewed-scope, mixed-scope stale, deleted-file, and reviewed-scope derivation cases required by the feature.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, commit diff, current `internal/llm` code paths, and relevant regression tests. The implementation satisfies the expected behavior for reviewed-clean, mixed-scope, no-reviewed-scope, and deleted-file missing-finding transitions, and I did not find any remaining feature-scoped defects or shared-state guidance gaps.
